[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 10100001 3
2 10100100 3
3 01101111 6
4 00110001 3
5 01010100 3
6 00000110 2
7 11011111 7
